item.waterupgrade.drinking_upgrade.toolt: Drinks player with water items from backpack's inventory
item.waterupgrade.advanced_drinking_upgr:
Drinks player with water items from backpack's inventory
More options for when water gets fed to player
gui.waterupgrade.upgrades.buttons.thirst:
Drink as soon as the player is slightly thirsty
wastes hydration points of drinks

Drink only when the player is sufficiently thirsty
wastes at most half the hydration of drinks

Drink only when the player is sufficiently thirsty
doesn't waste any hydration of drinks
gui.waterupgrade.upgrades.buttons.drink_:
Drink the player immediately when hurt
Ignores thirst setting when the player isn't at max health
gui.waterupgrade.upgrades.buttons.do_not:
Do not consider health
Ignores player's health and feeds based on thirst only
